Welcome! This page is designed to test screen reader navigation patterns.

Overview

This dashboard provides accessibility scan results and metrics. Use landmarks, headings, or tab navigation to explore the content.

The elements below have intentional accessibility issues that the screen reader navigator should flag.

Unnamed Button

Generic Link Text

Skipped Heading Level

This heading jumped from h3 to h5, skipping h4.
